title: Advantages for OFWs Applying to POEA for Overseas Employment
content: OFWs gain several advantages by applying for overseas employment through the POEA-GPB, including: 1) No placement fee charged to the worker; 2) Close monitoring of employers and workers to prevent welfare and legal issues; 3) Provision of an Employee Guarantee Trust Fund to protect workers; 4) Minimization of processing cycle time to ensure timely deployment.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
